title: Västerås, Västmanland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Västerås, Västmanland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Västerås is a city in Västmanland with a population of 154,000. A lakeside city on Lake Mälaren, known for its Viking history, power engineering, and outdoor recreation.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
